name: Backpack
description: Leather satchel for carrying gear; holds about 60 lbs of equipment.

name: Rations, Iron (1 week)
description: Dried meat, hardtack, and preserved food; lasts one week.

name: Rations, Standard (1 week)
description: Basic trail rations including dried fruit and nuts.

name: Flask (empty)
description: Glass container for liquids; holds about 1 pint.

name: Torch
description: Burns for 1 hour; provides light in darkness.

name: Lantern, Hooded
description: Oil-burning lamp with adjustable shutter; burns 1 hour per pint.

name: Lantern, Bullseye
description: Focused beam lantern; illuminates cone 60 ft long.

name: Oil (1 flask)
description: Lamp oil or Greek fire (if special); burns 1 hour per flask.

name: Rope, Hemp (50 ft)
description: Strong rope; can hold up to 300 lbs safely.

name: Mirror, Small
description: Polished silver mirror; useful for signaling.

name: Ink (1 oz vial)
description: Writing ink for scrolls and documents.

name: Parchment (1 sheet)
description: Writing surface for scrolls and notes.

name: Book, Spellbook (blank)
description: Bound tome for recording spells; 100 pages.

name: Bag, Coin (1000 coins)
description: Heavy sack designed for coin storage.

name: Crowbar
description: Iron bar for prying open doors and lids.

name: Spike, Iron (each)
description: Large nail for securing doors or climbing.

name: Whistle
description: Signal whistle; audible up to 1/2 mile.

name: Holy Symbol
description: Sacred emblem for clerics and paladins.

name: Holy Water (flask)
description: Blessed water; damages undead on contact.

name: Silver Mirror
description: Used to detect shapeshifters and vampires.

name: Disguise Kit
description: Makeup, false facial hair, and clothing accents.
